name: mb-smart-product-wiki
description: Ministry Brands Smart Product Wiki. Three skills for product teams: the Knowledgebase Maker (builds a complete two-page product knowledgebase, a Knowledge Base Overview dashboard plus a deep Knowledgebase reference, from a guided interview and live product walkthrough; both are paste-ready markdown for Confluence), the Knowledgebase Assistant (your day-to-day companion for querying, updating, auditing, and prepping your knowledgebase before any task; runs a structural audit automatically on every load), and the Persona Maker (creates data-informed user personas with gap analysis and a concrete validation plan). Plain language throughout, no developer jargon. Never proceeds on assumptions: if Claude cannot access a URL, document, or file the user referenced, it stops and resolves access first. All knowledgebases save to the MB Design Ops Confluence template at https://ministrybrands.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/DR/pages/6534463521/Product+Name+Knowledge+Base+Overview.
